news.headline: Russian hiker becomes Japan’s latest bear attack victim as another grim record looms
news.summary:
A Russian hiker was seriously injured in the mountainous west of Tokyo on Sunday morning, raising fears that Japan could be heading for another record year of human-bear encounters.
Police said a bear attacked the man as he was hiking along a forest road near Mount Sanukido, close to the town of Oku
